data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of service add-ons, specifically deep conditioning, as part of the service offerings. However, the evidence provided does not include any mention or confirmation of deep conditioning as a service add-on, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The linked use case outlines various needs but does not provide concrete evidence that the specific add-on is available or implemented in the system.
gaps: No evidence of service add-ons (deep conditioning) being implemented or available.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify service add-ons availability
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check that deep conditioning is listed as a service add-on.
